html_body:
<script>(function () {
  var blocked = /[<>"'&]/;

  function protectInput(el) {
    el.addEventListener('keydown', function (e) {
      if (blocked.test(e.key)) e.preventDefault();
    });

    el.addEventListener('paste', function (e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      var text = (e.clipboardData || window.clipboardData).getData('text');
      var sanitized = text.replace(/[<>"'&]/g, '');
      var start = this.selectionStart;
      var end = this.selectionEnd;
      this.value = this.value.slice(0, start) + sanitized + this.value.slice(end);
      this.selectionStart = this.selectionEnd = start + sanitized.length;
    });
  }

  function init() {
    ['address-form-compl', 'address-form-ref'].forEach(function (id) {
      var el = document.getElementById(id);
      if (el) protectInput(el);
    });
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
  } else {
    init();
  }
})();</script>
